metadata.description: First-party plugins for UR-AGENT. This marketplace is hosted in the same repository as the agent itself and advertises plugin capability surfaces for commands, MCP tools, skills, templates, validators, and language adapters.

plugins.name: hello
plugins.description: Example plugin that adds a `/hello` command. Useful as a template for new plugins.

plugins.name: git-summary
plugins.description: /git-summary — one-paragraph factual summary of the working tree and recent commits. Useful before standup, before a PR, or before clocking out.

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: /code-review — structured review of the working diff against a base ref. Covers correctness, style, test coverage, and security with a mandatory TL;DR verdict.

plugins.name: explain-error
plugins.description: /explain-error — re-runs a failing command, decodes the error in plain English, and proposes two concrete next steps ordered by likelihood.

plugins.name: release-notes
plugins.description: /release-notes — drafts release notes from git log since the last tag, grouped by Features / Fixes / Documentation / Other.

plugins.name: evaluate-response
plugins.description: /evaluate-response — adversarial self-evaluation of the most recent assistant turn. Catches hallucinated completions, missed sub-questions, and narrated-but-not-done work.

plugins.name: obsidian
plugins.description: /second-brain, /daily-note, /moc, /backlinks, /vault-search — operate an Obsidian vault as a second brain via direct file edits or the Local REST API MCP server.

plugins.name: github
plugins.description: /gh-pr-review, /gh-pr-create, /gh-issues, /gh-repo-health — drive GitHub through the official remote MCP server or the gh CLI.

plugins.name: gitlab
plugins.description: /gl-mr-review, /gl-mr-create, /gl-issues, /gl-pipeline — drive GitLab through the official MCP server or the glab CLI.

plugins.name: huggingface
plugins.description: /hf-model-search, /hf-dataset-search, /hf-model-card, /hf-download — search, vet, and fetch Hugging Face models and datasets via the official MCP server or the hf CLI.

plugins.name: word
plugins.description: /docx-new, /docx-from-md, /docx-review, /docx-edit — create, convert, review, and edit Word documents via the Office Word MCP server or a pandoc / python-docx fallback.

plugins.name: powerpoint
plugins.description: /pptx-new, /pptx-from-md, /pptx-review, /pptx-theme — build, convert, review, and theme PowerPoint decks via the Office PowerPoint MCP server or a python-pptx fallback.

plugins.name: miro
plugins.description: /miro-board, /miro-diagram, /miro-stickies, /miro-export — create boards, diagrams, and sticky clusters and summarize boards via Miro's official MCP server or the REST API.

plugins.name: skill-forge
plugins.description: /forge-skill, /skill-refine — the active model authors a complete SKILL.md from your description and saves it to your skills directory. Complements the built-in /create-skill scaffolder.

plugins.name: engineering-discipline
plugins.description: /discipline-check plus a reproducible-release skill, release-verifier template, release-gate validator, and Markdown language adapter metadata.
